port.label: HTTP Port
port.tooltip: Port for the emulated Home Assistant server (default: 8123)

bindAddress.label: Bind to Interface
bindAddress.tooltip: Select network interface to listen on (0.0.0.0 = all interfaces)

serviceName.label: Service Name
serviceName.tooltip: Name shown on the display during discovery

visUrl.label: Redirect URL
visUrl.tooltip: URL where devices will be redirected after authentication (e.g., http://192.168.1.100:8082/vis/)

_warning.text: **Important:** Do not use 'localhost' or '127.0.0.1' - use the actual IP address of your ioBroker server!

mdnsEnabled.label: Enable mDNS Discovery
mdnsEnabled.tooltip: Broadcast the service via mDNS so devices can find it automatically (requires Avahi on Linux)

_mdnsInfo.text:
mDNS uses Avahi on Linux. Install with: `sudo apt install avahi-daemon`

If mDNS is disabled or not working, enter the URL manually on the display:
`http://YOUR_IP:8123`

authRequired.label: Require Authentication
authRequired.tooltip: If enabled, devices must enter valid credentials to authenticate

_authInfo.text: Note: Authentication is optional. The display will always go through the authentication flow, but credentials are only validated if this option is enabled.
